task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into Oscar EMR
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Oscar EMR authenticated interface (dashboard or main menu) after logging in with the provided credentials.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the existing 'OSCAR Demo' facility record
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the administration or settings page where the clinic/facility details for the existing 'OSCAR Demo' record are open for editing.

task_completion.description: Verify the street address and suite were updated
task_completion.visual_evidence: The street address input field(s) in the facility record contain '455 Dovercourt Rd' and 'Suite 102'.

task_completion.description: Verify the city, province, and postal code were updated
task_completion.visual_evidence: The city field contains 'Toronto', the province field contains 'ON' (or Ontario), and the postal code field contains 'M6H 2W3'.

task_completion.description: Verify the phone and fax numbers were updated
task_completion.visual_evidence: The phone number field contains '416-555-0198' and the fax number field contains '416-555-0199'.

task_completion.description: Verify the updated record was saved successfully
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation message indicating the facility was updated successfully, or the final screenshot shows the saved details applied to the 'OSCAR Demo' record.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web GUI to update the record
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacted with the Oscar EMR web application via a browser, not using terminal commands, database queries, or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not create a new facility record
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent edited the existing 'OSCAR Demo' facility. There should be no evidence of an 'Add New Facility' form being submitted or multiple 'OSCAR Demo' entries appearing in a facility list.

integrity.description: Verify the data was entered into the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: The new contact details are typed into the actual Oscar EMR web form fields, not just written in a notepad, text editor, or search bar.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target facility name: 'OSCAR Demo'. Expected Address: '455 Dovercourt Rd, Suite 102', City: 'Toronto', Province: 'ON', Postal: 'M6H 2W3'. Expected Phone: '416-555-0198', Expected Fax: '416-555-0199'. Note: The phone and fax numbers are synthetic test numbers using the 555 exchange. The agent must update the existing record, not create a new one.
